status.label: Public evidence library linked
status.method: Manual source pass plus automated link-health checks. Added backup public sources for access-restricted pages, thin records, and key-player ownership/product context. Brief-aligned v2 pass added Appfigures contract sources, market moves, media/cultural drivers, awards/funding sources and relationship wording cleanup.
status.caveat: Public sources validate existence, positioning, and selected ownership/product claims. They do not automatically prove every size, momentum, AI, or strategic-importance statement. Appfigures, Similarweb, Crunchbase, internal CRM, and authenticated Confluence still remain credentialed layers and should not be implied as live-connected.
status.appfiguresPolicy: Appfigures metrics are pending unless explicitly populated from a credentialed export.
status.relationshipPolicy: Internal relationship status not yet captured in this dataset. To be completed by Yousician.

simply.summary: Simply evidence now combines official product pages, developer/app-store portfolio pages, and Yousician market research; this better supports company identity, app portfolio, and direct music-learning overlap.
openQuestions: Ownership/investor history beyond public developer pages

ultimate-guitar.summary: Ultimate Guitar evidence now includes Muse Group ownership/scale context plus Google Play app evidence for tabs, chords, practice tools, and multi-instrument use.
openQuestions: Recent monetization and AI product direction

fender-play.summary: Fender Play is now supported by app-store sources plus the official Fender Play page and internal market research; public evidence validates guitar/bass/ukulele lessons and app positioning, while Appfigures is still needed for performance.
openQuestions: Hardware bundle and Samsung/TV expansion impact

flowkey.summary: flowkey evidence now combines official product, app-store, and Yamaha partnership sources validating piano learning, feedback, song-led practice, and hardware-partner distribution.

skoove.summary: Skoove evidence now includes official web, Google Play, and App Store sources validating AI listening, piano lessons, feedback, and app-store positioning.

justinguitar.summary: Official website and app sources support creator-led guitar education, beginner curriculum, and play-along app positioning.

artie-piano.summary: Artie evidence now combines ArtMaster product, review/explainer, and App Store sources for AI piano teacher positioning, real-time feedback, and emerging app presence.
openQuestions: Model/feedback quality against established piano apps

fender.summary: Fender evidence now combines Fender Play, app-store presence, and market research to validate the brand-backed software path from hardware into learning.

yamaha.summary: Official Yamaha sources validate instruments, audio, music education, schools, and broader group relevance.

thomann.summary: Thomann evidence now includes official retail and company-history sources validating European channel relevance, ownership context, and gear-purchase surface.

sweetwater.summary: Sweetwater evidence now includes official retail and mobile app sources validating US gear retail, Sales Engineer support, Gear Exchange, and mobile channel relevance.

bandlab.summary: BandLab evidence now includes reported 100M user milestone; active engagement still requires validation.

musescore.summary: MuseScore and Muse Group sources validate notation, sheet-music ecosystem, ownership context, and scale signals.

songsterr.summary: Official and app-store sources validate tab/practice utility, play-along audio, subscription app model, and AI tab-creation signal.

splice.summary: Splice evidence now includes label/AI partnership signals and rights-secure AI workflow direction.
openQuestions: Current paid subscriber and revenue estimates

ableton.summary: Official Ableton sources validate Live, Push, and broader creator-tool ecosystem for music production workflows.

suno.summary: Official Suno sources validate prompt-to-song creation and company positioning; RIAA source marks major legal/industry risk.
openQuestions: Consumer adoption, retention, and paid conversion

udio.summary: Official Udio and App Store sources validate AI music creation; RIAA and UMG sources mark litigation and licensing transition signals.
openQuestions: Impact on broader AI music legitimacy

moises.summary: Moises evidence now includes company-reported funding/user scale and AI Studio product direction.
openQuestions: Current MAU/revenue by geography via Appfigures/Similarweb

duolingo.summary: Duolingo evidence now includes official Music launch and hardware tie-in signal; music-specific performance still needs triangulation.
openQuestions: Transferability of language-learning loops to music practice

kahoot.summary: Kahoot evidence now includes official AI tools and trust pages, validating AI-assisted content creation and availability in addition to general game-based learning positioning.

brilliant.summary: Official and app-store sources validate active problem-solving, interactive learning, and AI/personal tutor positioning.
openQuestions: Habit mechanics that transfer to music

marty-music.summary: Official Marty Music source supports creator-led guitar education; still needs audience validation from YouTube/social analytics.

berklee-online.summary: Official Berklee Online sources validate formal music education, online courses, certificates, and degree programs.

mtna.summary: Official MTNA sources validate teacher-network role, professional development, membership, and music-teaching ecosystem relevance.

rsi.summary: Creator/audience evidence is light: Rousseau is retained as cultural signal, but needs stronger audience and channel verification.

apple-garageband.summary: Official Apple and App Store sources validate GarageBand as accessible creation software inside Apple's ecosystem.

accel.summary: Official Accel sources validate capital-signal role and portfolio context; not a direct player unless mapped to specific investments.

techcrunch.summary: TechCrunch is a monitoring source for startup/product/funding signals, not a strategic player itself.

bett-awards.summary: Official Bett sources validate education-technology awards, categories, and recognition opportunity surface.

creative-europe.summary: European Commission sources validate funding programme and current calls for cultural and creative sectors.

guitar-tricks.summary: Guitar Tricks evidence now combines official/manual product page with App Store and Google Play sources for structured lessons, guided videos, and song-led beginner positioning.

truefire.summary: TrueFire evidence now includes official and app-store sources validating deep guitar lesson library, app availability, tabs, jam tracks, and course depth.

pickup-music.summary: Pickup Music evidence now combines official product, course, pricing, app-store, and company-profile sources for structured guitar pathways, feedback, live lessons, and community positioning.

rocksmith-plus.summary: Ubisoft and app-store sources validate Rocksmith+ as a subscription learning service for guitar, bass, and piano with songs and real-instrument feedback.

gibson-app.summary: Official Gibson App and App Store sources validate guitar learning, real-time feedback, songs, tuner, chords, tabs, and Gibson brand bundle relevance.

piano-marvel.summary: Official and App Store sources validate Piano Marvel as piano learning software with songs, lessons, reading practice, and teacher/classroom relevance.

melodics.summary: Official and App Store sources validate Melodics as an interactive practice app for drums, keys, and pads with real-time feedback.

chordify.summary: Chordify evidence now combines official/manual site evidence, Google Play, App Store, and support documentation for automatic chords, tuner, app availability, and play-along workflows.

soundslice.summary: Official and teacher-facing sources validate Soundslice as an interactive notation/video practice and teaching platform.

guitar-pro.summary: Official and Google Play sources validate Guitar Pro as a major tab editor/reader with desktop and mobile practice relevance.
openQuestions: AI tab creation and arrangement roadmap

youtube-artists.summary: Official YouTube for Artists product/resource sources validate YouTube as artist-growth, Official Artist Channel, music-promotion, creator, and discovery infrastructure; local Yousician research also marks YouTube as a high-burden free-learning default.

gibson.summary: Official Gibson source validates hardware brand relevance and explicit Gibson App bundling with guitar/amp purchases.

positive-grid.summary: Official Positive Grid and Spark App sources validate smart amp, app-led practice, AI/smart features, tones, and connected guitar ecosystem relevance.

reverb.summary: Reverb evidence now includes official app pages and the official Reverb ownership-change update confirming Creator Partners/Servco after the Etsy sale closed in June 2025; traffic and category scale still need metrics.
openQuestions: Post-Etsy ownership strategy and operating changes

guitar-center.summary: Official Guitar Center Lessons source validates retail-linked private lessons and offline learning channel relevance.

boss.summary: Official BOSS source validates guitar/bass effects, amps, loop stations, and performance/practice gear ecosystem relevance.

soundtrap.summary: Soundtrap evidence now includes official creation and education sources validating browser-based studio, school workflows, loops, instruments, and collaboration.

fl-studio.summary: Official Image-Line and market-news sources validate FL Studio as a major accessible production platform moving toward cloud/web workflows.
openQuestions: Beginner creator onboarding and AI assistance

soundcloud.summary: SoundCloud evidence now includes company, artist-tool, and app-store sources validating creator community, artist distribution, audience tools, and mobile music sharing.

distrokid.summary: DistroKid evidence now includes official mobile app page and app-store sources for music distribution, release management, artist tools, and scale claims.

landr.summary: Official LANDR sources validate bundled AI mastering, distribution, plugins, samples, courses, stem separation, and creator-service positioning.

native-instruments.summary: Official company and inMusic announcement sources validate the production software/hardware ecosystem and May 2026 definitive acquisition agreement; closing/status and product roadmap still need monitoring.
openQuestions: Deal close / final ownership status after the May 2026 agreement

bandcamp.summary: Official Bandcamp source validates direct-to-fan artist marketplace; AI-policy news marks strong human-authenticity positioning signal.
openQuestions: Relevance to learning creators and teacher-musicians

lalal-ai.summary: Official and Google Play sources validate LALAL.AI as an AI stem separation and vocal/instrumental isolation utility.

aiva.summary: AIVA evidence now includes official product and download sources validating AI music generation, desktop tools, style models, editing, and licensing positioning.
openQuestions: Licensing confidence vs newer AI music players

elevenlabs-music.summary: Official ElevenLabs sources validate AI music generation and strategic expansion from broader AI audio into full music generation.

tonebase.summary: tonebase evidence now includes broader official and instrument-specific sources for premium classical music education, expert instructors, and subscription positioning.

artistworks.summary: ArtistWorks evidence now includes official and library-channel evidence for self-paced video lessons, professional musician instruction, and personalized learning availability.

spotify-artists.summary: Official Spotify for Artists and Campaign Kit sources validate artist profile, analytics, promotion, merch, video, and streaming-career tooling.
openQuestions: Which campaign tools change hobbyist release goals

tiktok-artists.summary: Official TikTok for Artists product and support sources validate TikTok as a music-insights, artist-certification, and promotion surface.
openQuestions: Song trend spillover into what learners want to play

patreon.summary: Official Patreon for Musicians source validates musician memberships, direct fan monetization, shops, and community building.
openQuestions: Relevance to Yousician partnerships or influencer strategy

musora.summary: Official Musora and App Store sources validate a multi-instrument lesson ecosystem across drums, piano, guitar, singing, community, and app-based subscription learning.
openQuestions: Overlap with Yousician guitar, piano, and beginner segments

fretello.summary: Fretello evidence now combines official home/app pages plus App Store and Google Play sources for personalized guitar lessons, structured practice, and app positioning.

playground-sessions.summary: Official and Google Play sources validate Playground Sessions as an interactive piano learning product with song-led lessons, progress feedback, and subscription/lifetime pricing.

tomplay.summary: Official and Google Play sources validate Tomplay as an interactive sheet-music and backing-track practice app with multi-instrument repertoire.

chord-ai.summary: Chord ai evidence now combines App Store, Google Play, Nomad AI, and official product sources validating AI chord/beat recognition, song analysis, app availability, and practice utility fit.

musicca.summary: Musicca evidence now includes official product and exercise sources validating free theory, ear-training, notes, chords, scales, rhythm, and web-based learning tools.
openQuestions: Conversion from theory tools to instrument practice
Fit as benchmark or partner surface

abrsm.summary: Official ABRSM sources validate music exams, graded assessment, curriculum authority, apps, and practice tools.
openQuestions: Regional relevance for Yousician priority markets
Teacher and parent influence on learning choices

rcm.summary: Royal Conservatory evidence now includes official learning and digital-learning sources validating curriculum, exams, certificates, and teacher-supported progression.

school-of-rock.summary: School of Rock evidence now uses Method app store sources to validate tailored song assignments, weekly private lessons, and performance-based learning, without relying only on the access-restricted lesson page.

flat-io.summary: Flat evidence now includes official product and education sources validating cloud notation, collaboration, composition, assignments, and teacher workflows.

noteflight.summary: Noteflight evidence now includes official product and Learn sources validating online notation, composition, classroom use, and education plans.
openQuestions: AI composition or teacher workflow roadmap

donner.summary: Official Donner store and Google Play sources validate affordable gear, broad instrument catalog, and an app-connected hardware surface.
openQuestions: App usage and connected gear adoption

gear4music.summary: Official Gear4music education source validates European retail channel relevance, education supplies, instruments, and beginner/classroom purchasing surface.

audacity.summary: Official Audacity source validates a free, accessible recording/editing workflow that can bridge learning and hobbyist creation.

soundation.summary: Official Soundation source validates browser-based music creation, loops, collaboration, and online production workflow.

beatstars.summary: Official BeatStars sources validate producer storefronts, beat marketplace, licensing, and creator-business monetization workflows.

flow-music.summary: Official Flow Music and Riffusion redirect sources validate the current AI music-generation app destination and preserve the Riffusion-origin signal.
openQuestions: Competitive positioning vs Suno and Udio

ripx-daw.summary: Official RipX source validates AI stem separation, audio editing, remixing, and note-level manipulation for musician workflows.

klangio.summary: Official Klangio source validates AI audio-to-score transcription across instruments, MIDI/tabs, and practice-material conversion.

music-ally.summary: Official Music Ally source validates music-industry intelligence coverage for rights, DSPs, marketing, AI policy, and platform developments.
openQuestions: Which topics should feed the board export

midia-research.summary: Official MIDiA source validates music-industry and creator-economy research coverage for market framing and board-level trend context.

namm.summary: Official NAMM source validates music-products industry relevance across hardware, retail, education, events, and product-launch monitoring.
openQuestions: Which NAMM announcements matter to Yousician

luminate.summary: Official Luminate source validates music-consumption and entertainment-data signal potential for charts, audience behavior, and market reporting.
openQuestions: Song and genre trend relevance for learning demand
How to connect to strategic monitoring

chartmetric.summary: Official Chartmetric source validates artist, playlist, social, streaming, and trend intelligence relevant to learner song demand.

a16z-consumer.summary: Public a16z Consumer source validates this as an investor-thesis signal for consumer AI, creator tools, and adjacent learning-product capital flows.
openQuestions: Music, creator, or education thesis mentions

general-catalyst.summary: Public General Catalyst source validates this as a broader growth-capital signal for applied AI, consumer technology, education, and transformation investing.
openQuestions: Relevant AI, education, or consumer portfolio companies

eic-accelerator.summary: Official EIC Accelerator source validates a concrete EU funding route for high-risk startup and SME innovation, including possible AI or creative-technology initiatives.

horizon-europe-cluster-2.summary: Official Horizon Europe Cluster 2 source validates culture, creativity, and inclusive-society funding as a strategic partnership route for music participation and learning research.

eit-culture-creativity.summary: Official EIT Culture & Creativity source validates creative-sector innovation, skills, and venture-support opportunities relevant to music, learning, and creator-economy partnerships.

apple-design-awards.summary: Official Apple Design Awards source validates a high-signal recognition route and benchmark for app craft, interaction, accessibility, innovation, and technical quality.
openQuestions: Which annual categories fit Yousician best

google-play-best-of.summary: Official Google Play Best Of source validates Android-side editorial recognition as a benchmark for standout mobile products and platform visibility.

Competitive recognition examples in learning or creativity

music-tectonics.summary: Official Music Tectonics source validates this as a music-tech startup, investor, partner, AI, rights, and creator-tool monitoring surface.

learning-technologies-awards.summary: Official Learning Technologies Awards source validates a broader learning-tech recognition signal for AI learning, digital learning impact, and L&D market expectations.

Use as benchmark only or active submission target

sxsw-edu-launch.summary: Official SXSW EDU Launch source validates an education-startup and learning-innovation signal for early-stage product narratives, investor exposure, and adjacent EdTech themes.
